docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $431.50 FILED BY MCCUNE ROCHELLE AS TO DEFENDANT EVANGELISTA MILAGROS IND DBA 437 DUBOCE AVE ALCAYDE TERESITA IND DBA 437 DUBOCE AVENUE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-26-1991 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 06
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT EVANGELISTA MILAGROS IND DBA 437 DUBOCE AVE

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MCCUNE ROCHELLE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT EVANGELISTA MILAGROS IND DBA 437 DUBOCE AVE ALCAYDE TERESITA IND DBA 437 DUBOCE AVENUE $253.13 PRINCIPAL, $14.70 INTEREST, $28.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $295.83, PRINCIPAL CALCULATED AS FOLLOWS: $900 DEPOSITS $378 LAST MONTHS RENT + $163.13 INTEREST AT 5% STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
